name: sterling
description: Sterling monorepo — plugin sources. The shipped plugin is described in STERLING-SPEC.md section 2.2.

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/schemas/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/store/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/mcp-server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/tui/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: node scripts/check-agent-registry.mjs && node scripts/check-totality.mjs && node scripts/check-spawn-contracts.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-prompts.mjs && node scripts/check-skills.mjs
